# Minimum Viable Distribution Engine

The system works only when content has enough exposure to learn from.

## Engine components

### 1. Organic feed

Post platform-native assets.

### 2. Search lane

Publish evergreen answer videos.

### 3. Owned lane

Share strongest assets to any owned channel:

```text
newsletter
Discord
Slack
website
LinkedIn profile
Instagram Stories
YouTube Community
```

### 4. Partner lane

Build one weekly partner/collab action:

```text
reply to creator
stitch/duet
ask expert for reaction
share in niche community
```

### 5. Paid/data lane

Use paid micro-seeding only for measurement when organic reach is too low.

## Minimum engine per week

```text
5 organic posts
2 search-native posts
1 owned-channel push
1 partner/community push
1 controlled exposure test if organic data is insufficient
```

## Guarantee created

This does not guarantee virality. It guarantees enough distribution paths that the research system does not depend entirely on one algorithmic surface.
